headline: 16 contracts catalogued across Lista DAO ecosystem: 5 core protocol contracts, governance token, staking receipts, and supporting infrastructure on Binance Smart Chain

findings.text: BSCScan name-tag search for 'Lista' yielded LISTA token (0xFceB31A79F71AC9CBDCF853519c1b12D379EdC46) and lisUSD stablecoin (0x0782b6d8c4551b9760e74c0545a9bcd90bdc41e5) with verified contracts

Official docs audit page at https://docs.bsc.lista.org/security/audit-reports lists audit reports by feature; deployed-contracts canonical page not directly located but audit reports reference scope contracts

14 audit reports spanning 2022-2026 from Bailsec, Blocksec, OpenZeppelin, Cantina, Spearbit, PeckShield, and others covering Credit Loans, CDP mechanisms, slisBNB Provider, Token emissions, AMO, OFT, PSM, Liquid Staking, veLISTA governance, and Airdrop functionality

GitHub repositories identified at github.com/lista-dao with multiple repos: lista-dao-contracts, moolah (lending), lista-token, synclub-contracts (staking); deployment artifacts not directly accessible due to fetch restrictions but audit scope tables reference deployed addresses
Single-chain deployment on Binance Smart Chain; all surfaced addresses belong to BSC mainnet
No factory contracts with large enumerable children identified in initial surface; slisBNB is ERC-20 token, not factory
Role taxonomy applied: governance token (LISTA), stablecoin (lisUSD), liquid staking tokens (slisBNB, slisBNBx), stake manager (contract), proxy contracts
5 primary addresses traced to BSCScan verified contract pages with full source code visibility; slisBNB and slisBNBx use EIP-1967 transparent proxy pattern

rationale.verdict: Discovery slice catalogued 5 core protocol contracts on Binance Smart Chain (LISTA token, lisUSD stablecoin, slisBNB liquid staking receipt, slisBNBx non-transferable variant, ListaStakeManager), backed by comprehensive audit reports from 2022-2026 and GitHub repository links. No exhaustive factory enumeration performed; addresses record the main control and fund-holding surface.

evidence.shows: LISTA governance token (ERC-20 standard), deployed at 0xFceB31A79F71AC9CBDCF853519c1b12D379EdC46 on BSC, contract creator 0xcc65d823266fdf9eeb8dbde2c2e494492ac64a88, mints 1B tokens to owner address
lisUSD stablecoin token (formerly HAY, rebranded), uses EIP-1967 transparent proxy at 0x0782b6d8c4551b9760e74c0545a9bcd90bdc41e5 with implementation at 0xf5bd9b192092517d60e90c9af17b69b134c4d7f8
slisBNB (Staked Lista BNB) liquid staking token, transparent proxy at 0xB0b84D294e0C75A6abe60171b70edEb2EFd14A1B with implementation 0xd9edeba7f3580f5e22821a52fc1ba8508f4e34d0
slisBNBx (slisBNB Non-Transferable Receipt), transparent proxy at 0x4b30fcAA7945fE9fDEFD2895aae539ba102Ed6F6 with implementation 0x44f987fe1fd3597abcf95b8790351d00ff64c5aa
ListaStakeManager contract handling BNB liquid staking via StakeHub; handles validator delegation, share conversion, and staking pool management

Comprehensive audit report index for Lista DAO covering 2022-2026, listing 30+ security audits by Bailsec, Blocksec, OpenZeppelin, Cantina, Spearbit, PeckShield, Supremacy, Veridise, SlowMist, and Certik for CDP contracts, liquid staking, governance tokens, lending providers, and AMO functionality

Lista DAO GitHub organization housing multiple repositories: lista-dao-contracts (main CDP contracts, 57 Solidity files), moolah (lending protocol), lista-token (governance and token infrastructure), synclub-contracts (staking manager)

unknowns: D2: Official canonical deployed-contracts documentation page not directly fetched; audit report scope tables reference contract addresses but deployment index not separately verified
D4: GitHub deployment artifacts (Foundry broadcast files, hardhat-deploy structures) not accessible; audit reports and BSCScan serve as primary contract discovery sources
D6: Factory child enumeration not completed; slisBNB may have associated pools/markets requiring separate enumeration

protocol_metadata.about: Lista DAO is a decentralized CDP (Collateralized Debt Position) protocol and liquid staking solution on Binance Smart Chain. Users stake BNB to earn slisBNB liquid staking receipts while maintaining liquidity, and borrow the lisUSD stablecoin against multiple collateral types including slisBNB and other LSTs. The protocol is governed by the LISTA token, with comprehensive smart contract audits from top-tier security firms.
